title: Breed Parrots With Seeds
description: Allows parrots to be bred using any type of seed, creating cute baby parrots!
body:
# Breed Parrots With Seeds! 
This mod introduces an exciting, highly desired feature that allows you to breed parrots using any type of seed. Now, you can enjoy a new level of interaction with parrots, as they can pair up and create adorable offspring! 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8FI3C53d7-w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### How It Works 🐦
PARROT BREEDING: Simply get two of your tamed parrots, and feed them with any type of seed. Ensure that they are not sitting down or mounted on your shoulder. After that, they will enter a breeding state, producing heart particles. After a short period of time, the parrots will produce a little baby parrot. The offspring will inherit a variant from either of the parents! The baby parrot will automatically be tamed.
### Installation 📥
1. Download the appropiate .jar file for your game version
2. From your downloads, place the mods .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder 
3. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric mod loader, and breed some parrots!
### Note for multiplayer servers 🎮
For the mod to work properly, all players should have the mod downloaded, along with the server itself. While the core mechanics of parrot breeding will work for those who do not have the mod downloaded, the breeding process will appear buggy, and the small sized baby parrots will appear to be normal sized parrots. This is due to the fact that the mod changes the way that parrots are rendered if they are a baby, and all rendering is handled on the client side of the game. 
#
